bundle.name: stark-implement
bundle.description: Autonomously execute a development phase end-to-end — implement, PR, review, fix, merge, release — via a paired lead/wing agent loop. Maps to spec-kit's implement phase.

artifacts.name: stark-copilot
artifacts.description: Autonomous lead/wing implementation: lead subagent implements, wing subagent reviews, fix-loop until wing approves. Use for copilot, paired build.

artifacts.name: stark-phase-execute
artifacts.description: Autonomously execute a dev phase: implement tasks, PR, review, fix, merge, release. Use for execute phase, run plan.
